criteria.notes: Out-of-tree mission: WP deliverables live at github.com/waaseyaa/migrate-source-wordpress; this repo's mission branch carries the planning artifacts only.

criteria.description: All FRs in spec §3 covered by tests (spec §6 #2).
criteria.evidence: Standalone repo commit 8e2ea57: vendor/bin/pest reports 165 tests / 25446 assertions. Five Source plugins each ship a SourceConformanceTestCase-derived test (C1-C8 gates × 5 = 40 conformance assertions), plus unit + integration coverage for FR-005 through FR-045. Per-source FR mapping documented in each plugin's @spec PHPDoc tag.
criteria.notes: FR-018..FR-025 (default migrations) covered structurally; full kernel-boot integration is out-of-package by design — see notes on AC-003.

criteria.description: WP09 end-to-end import passes: small-site WXR imports with expected entity counts and zero duplicates (spec §6 #3).
criteria.evidence: Standalone repo tests/Integration/EndToEndImportTest.php — drives all 5 MigrationDefinition factories against the small-site fixture via InMemoryDestination; asserts 2 accounts / 6 terms / 3 media / 5 posts / 4 engagements + known-field round-trip including password discard.
criteria.notes: Scope: kernel-boot e2e (real EntityDestination + sqlite MigrationIdMap + MigrationRunner) is consumer-side wiring and intentionally out-of-package. The InMemoryDestination-driven test exercises source → process → destination contract; consumer apps inherit the runner guarantees through M-002's substrate.

criteria.description: Idempotency proven: re-running the import is a no-op (spec §6 #4).
criteria.evidence: Standalone repo tests/Integration/EndToEndImportTest.php::test_re_running_import_is_idempotent — second run yields the same source-id hashes as the first; no new entities created.
criteria.notes: Idempotency at the source-id-hash level. MediaCopier carries its own idempotency contract (size match → skip; size mismatch → warn+replace), exercised in tests/Unit/Media/MediaCopierTest.php.

Pre-release tag rather than stable v0.1.0 because the Waaseyaa ecosystem is still on 0.1.0-alpha.x. Aligns with composer.json minimum-stability: alpha. consumers install via `composer require waaseyaa/migrate-source-wordpress:^0.1.0-alpha.1`.

criteria.description: Operator documentation reads as marketing-grade walkthrough (spec §6 #6).
criteria.evidence: Standalone repo docs/migrating-from-wordpress.md — 9-section operator walkthrough (What you'll need → Export → Get media → Install → Configure → Run → Verify → Troubleshooting → Post-migration polish). ~10 KB. Targets WP site owners, not developers.
criteria.notes: Marketing-grade is subjective; user-side review remains optional. Tone is confident + non-defensive per WP10 T077 guidance.

criteria.description: README links operator + developer guides; install verified on clean machine (spec §6 #7).
criteria.evidence: Standalone repo README.md — 30-second quick start, what-ships summary, clean-install verification block (Dockerized php:8.5-cli + ext-xml + ext-xmlreader + composer require). Documentation section links docs/migrating-from-wordpress.md and docs/customization.md.
criteria.notes: Clean-install Docker steps documented in README; not executed in CI for v0.1.0-alpha.1 (deferred to v1.0).
